title: Rabbit Villager Add-ons
description: Separate Add-on packs for Rabbit Villagers
body:
Rabbit Villagers Add-ons consists of a separate sound pack that changes the villager noises to match their animal counterpart, and a Fresh animations compatibility pack!

Made for the Rabbit Villagers pack!

OptiFine OR ETF/EMF mods Required

Tutorial:

Due to OptiFine having inconsistent updates and features, its recommended to use mods: EMF & ETF instead

If using OptiFine, make sure to enable these settings for complete features:

Video Settings -> Quality -> Custom Entity Models: ON
Random Entities -> ON
Emissive Textures -> ON
In order for it to work, Rabbit Villagers Sound pack goes above the main or fresh animations add-on pack.
